name: railroad-diagrams

en.when_to_use: Use it when a DSL, protocol, or configuration grammar needs a JSON.org-style railroad SVG instead of hand-written rendering, which fails at Choice loops, repetition branches, and endpoint alignment.
en.why_valuable: AI can write BNF text but cannot reliably calculate branch widths/heights, arc radii, and SVG connections for arbitrary nested grammars. The library deterministically converts a structure tree into a readable syntax diagram.

data_in.note: grammar is the discriminated union tree below, with each node mapping one-to-one to the same-named upstream constructor. It is not a BNF/EBNF string; the library does not parse grammar text.

grammar.text?: string -- required for terminal, nonterminal, and comment; absent by default for other nodes
grammar.items?: grammar[] -- required for sequence and choice; defaults to [] for other nodes
grammar.normal?: integer -- index of the main path in choice; defaults to 0 and must be within items
grammar.item?: grammar -- required for optional, oneOrMore, and zeroOrMore
grammar.repeat?: grammar -- return-path label for oneOrMore/zeroOrMore; defaults to Skip
grammar.skip?: boolean -- whether optional/zeroOrMore uses the bypass as its main path; defaults to false

spec.note: Upstream generates an SVG with natural width and height. The outer container defaults to an explicit height of 360px with two-axis scrolling; AI may provide another pixel height. Do not use vh or percentage heights.

when_to_use: 需要把 DSL、协议或配置文法渲成 JSON.org 风格 railroad SVG 时用它而非手写,因为原生在 Choice 回路、重复分支和端点对齐上失败。
why_valuable: AI 默认能写 BNF 文本,但做不到对任意嵌套文法稳定计算分支宽高、弧线半径和 SVG 连线;库把结构树确定地变成可读语法图。

data_in.note: grammar 是下面的判别联合树,每个节点一一映射上游同名构造器；不是 BNF/EBNF 字符串,库本身不解析文法文本。

grammar.text?: string —— terminal、nonterminal、comment 必填；其他节点默认无
grammar.items?: grammar[] —— sequence、choice 必填；其他节点默认 []
grammar.normal?: integer —— choice 的主路径索引,默认 0,必须落在 items 范围内
grammar.repeat?: grammar —— oneOrMore/zeroOrMore 的回程标签,默认 Skip
grammar.skip?: boolean —— optional/zeroOrMore 是否把绕行作为主路径,默认 false

spec.note: 上游生成自然宽高 SVG;外层默认显式 360px 高并允许双向滚动,AI 可传其他像素高度。禁用 vh/百分比高度。

example._why: 嵌套文法树的构造器对应关系有歧义,minimal 固定 Sequence + Choice + repetition 的真实层级。

carriers.widget: supported:纯 DOM/SVG;样式 link 与渲染容器都挂入 shadowRoot,无 worker/wasm/font/uplink
carriers.codex: supported:jsDelivr +esm 默认导出构造器集合,外加 pinned CSS

isolation.evidence: +esm 实测完全干净:无 document.head、无 createElement("style")、无 document.body、无 addEventListener(grep 全空)。渲染需外置 railroad-diagrams.css,由 boot 手动供给(artifact/codex 进 head,widget 进 shadowRoot)。Diagram(...).toSVG() 返回游离 <svg>,boot 追加到目标容器(库虽有 .addTo() 默认落 document.body,但 boot 刻意改用 .toSVG())。纯 DOM/SVG,零全局副作用,shadow 内完全安全。
